summaryEn: A senior Israeli officer to the "Occupation Army Radio": - "There are many dangers in Iran, and we always consider the possibility of our planes being hit". - "We operate in Iran's skies under great danger, and we are in a big learning race with the Iranians". - "The Iranians fire at planes all the time, they are ingenious at setting up ambushes, and we have to learn their methods".
